title: crepis gussonei
intro: Crepis gussonei, also known as the Crepis gussonei, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crepis gussonei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. Crepis gussonei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical applications.
